eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Kenosha, WI; at 11:07 AM on JUL 17, 2026 Effective until 11:22 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a required weekly test from the Kenosha County Sheriff's Office Division of Emergency Management to satisfy FEMA testing. This is only a TEST. NO ACTION NEEDED. This is only a TEST
